name: Max Verstappen - Race Engineer
description:
max verstappen as your race engineer.

"box box, no you can't 'nuh-uh' me. get in the fuckin box."

🍓🫐🍓🫐🍓🫐

tldr i saw a singular photo of max at a pitwall recently and hyperfixiated so hard that i made three moodboards and a playlist within an hour

tw! singular sui // cide joke in the opening message

imo the bot works best outside of race settings, since ai in general seems to not really understand how they work no matter how much detail you give it. also i left max's backstory pretty much completely blank except for the part where he is a redbull race engineer so its up to you on wether you'd like him to take the path from ex driver to engineer or straight to engineer!

the way max is written can make him sound kind of mean but if that's not your cup of tea the bot shouldnt have any major issues letting you guide it into a nicer direction, remember that the user and max don't have any set relationship other than driver / engineer written so its completely up to you!
creator: versappen
